name: EventHandler - AmmoPouch
description: Verify AmmoPouch EventHandler loads and can be read

steps.name: Get perk with EventHandlers
steps.code: var perk = Menace.SDK.Templates.FindAll("PerkTemplate"); var found = null; foreach(var p in perks) { var handlers = Menace.SDK.Templates.GetProperty("PerkTemplate", p.GetPropertyValue("name"), "EventHandlers"); if(handlers != null && handlers.GetType().IsArray && ((System.Collections.IEnumerable)handlers).Cast<object>().Count() > 0) { found = p; break; } } found != null

steps.name: Load EventHandlers array from perk
steps.code: var perks = Menace.SDK.Templates.FindAll("PerkTemplate"); if(perks.Length > 0) { var name = perks[0].GetPropertyValue("name"); var handlers = Menace.SDK.Templates.GetProperty("PerkTemplate", name.ToString(), "EventHandlers"); handlers != null } else { false }

steps.name: Verify EventHandlers is array
steps.code: var perks = Menace.SDK.Templates.FindAll("PerkTemplate"); if(perks.Length > 0) { var name = perks[0].GetPropertyValue("name"); var handlers = Menace.SDK.Templates.GetProperty("PerkTemplate", name.ToString(), "EventHandlers"); handlers != null && handlers.GetType().IsArray } else { false }

steps.name: Verify _type field readable
steps.code: var perks = Menace.SDK.Templates.FindAll("PerkTemplate"); if(perks.Length > 0) { var name = perks[0].GetPropertyValue("name"); var handlers = Menace.SDK.Templates.GetProperty("PerkTemplate", name.ToString(), "EventHandlers"); var found = false; foreach(var h in (System.Collections.IEnumerable)handlers) { try { var typeField = h.GetType().GetField("_type"); if(typeField != null) { found = true; break; } } catch {} } found } else { false }

steps.name: Read parameter field from EventHandler
steps.code: var perks = Menace.SDK.Templates.FindAll("PerkTemplate"); if(perks.Length > 0) { var name = perks[0].GetPropertyValue("name"); var handlers = Menace.SDK.Templates.GetProperty("PerkTemplate", name.ToString(), "EventHandlers"); var found = false; foreach(var h in (System.Collections.IEnumerable)handlers) { try { var field = h.GetType().GetField("ApplyToType") ?? h.GetType().GetField("BonusPercentage") ?? h.GetType().GetField("MinimumBonus"); if(field != null) { found = true; break; } } catch {} } found } else { false }
